scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: A sense of discombobulation. [A sense of discombobulation.]
Unknown speaker says: Discombobulation. [Discombobulation.]
Character B says: I feel a little discombobulated. [I feel a little discombobulated.]
Unknown speaker says: So discombobulated. [So discombobulated.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a complex, intimidating English word.
- Creates a sense of confusion that mirrors the target audience's feeling when faced with difficult vocabulary.
- Sets up the problem that the rest of the ad will solve.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
A sense of Discombobulation
I feel a little Discombobulated
Discombobulated

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: सुनने में ये वर्ड कितना भारी लगता है ना? बट इसका मीनिंग बहुत आसान है। चलो सिंपल इंग्लिश में समझते हैं। [Hearing this word, it sounds so heavy, right? But its meaning is very easy. Let's understand it in simple English.]
Character A says: आप डिस्कॉम्बोबुलेटेड तब होते हो जब आप बहुत ज्यादा कन्फ्यूज्ड हो जाते हो और दिमाग ब्लैंक हो जाता है। [You are discombobulated when you become very confused and your mind goes blank.]
Character A says: It simply means when you are confused, unsettled or mentally disorganized. [It simply means when you are confused, unsettled or mentally disorganized.]
Character A says: जैसे, इंटरव्यू में इंग्लिश बोलते टाइम वो नर्वस होकर कन्फ्यूज हो गया। [Like, while speaking English in an interview, he got nervous and confused.]
Character A says: He got discombobulated during the English interview. [He got discombobulated during the English interview.]
Character A says: ऐसे वर्ड्स रट तो लोगे, बट अगर प्रैक्टिस के लिए कोई पार्टनर नहीं है, तो बोलते टाइम हमेशा डिस्कॉम्बोबुलेटेड ही फील करोगे। [You will memorize such words, but if you don't have a partner for practice, you will always feel discombobulated while speaking.]
Character A says: इसी प्रॉब्लम का सलूशन है Supernova ऐप। [The solution to this very problem is the Supernova app.]
Character A says: यहाँ आपको मिलता है अपना खुद का AI Tutor, जो आपको बिना जज किए इंग्लिश बोलना सिखाता है। [Here you get your own AI Tutor, who teaches you to speak English without judging you.]
Character A says: आप अपने टाइम पर, कहीं भी प्रैक्टिस कर सकते हो। [You can practice on your own time, anywhere.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Breaks down the complex word into simple, relatable terms.
- Connects the vocabulary lesson to a real-world pain point (freezing up in interviews due to lack of practice).
- Introduces Supernova and its core value proposition: a non-judgmental AI Tutor available anytime.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Supernova पर आपको मिलती हैं डेली लेसन्स और रियल-लाइफ सिचुएशंस की प्रैक्टिस। [On Supernova you get daily lessons and practice for real-life situations.]
Character A says: जैसे कस्टमर से बात करना, ऑफिस मीटिंग्स, या दोस्तों के साथ इंग्लिश में गपशप। [Like talking to a customer, office meetings, or chatting with friends in English.]
Character A says: बोलते टाइम जहाँ आप अटकते हो, AI Tutor आपको इंस्टेंट फीडबैक देता है, ताकि आप तुरंत इम्प्रूव कर सको। [Wherever you get stuck while speaking, the AI Tutor gives you instant feedback, so you can improve immediately.]
Character A says: और सबसे अच्छी बात? ये आपके लिए एक सेफ स्पेस है। [And the best part? This is a safe space for you.]
Character A says: यहाँ कोई आपकी इंग्लिश का मज़ाक नहीं उड़ाएगा। गलतियाँ करो, और कॉन्फिडेंस के साथ सीखो। [No one will make fun of your English here. Make mistakes, and learn with confidence.]
Character A says: तो अगर आप भी बिना डरे फर्राटेदार इंग्लिश बोलना चाहते हो, [So if you also want to speak fluent English without fear,]
Character A says: कमेंट में लिखो 'APP' और मैं Supernova का लिंक आपके DM में शेयर कर दूंगी। [Write 'APP' in the comments and I will share the Supernova link in your DM.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Highlights key Supernova features tailored to working adults (office meetings, customer interactions, instant feedback).
- Reinforces the emotional payoff: a safe, judgment-free zone to build confidence.
- Ends with a clear, low-friction call to action to drive app downloads.
